spread.note: eToro does not add spread markup on ETFs. These are natural market spread estimates.

slippage.note: Market order fill deviation from quoted mid-price.

fx_conversion.note: Applied on deposit/withdrawal for non-USD accounts. 1.5% for EUR (default EU user).

overnight_fee.note: Non-leveraged long ETF buys = $0 overnight. CFD positions incur 0.15% open+close spread.

cfd.note: ~0.02% per day (~7.3% annualized) for holding short CFD positions overnight. Based on LIBOR + eToro markup.

inactivity_fee.note: Not simulated — active trader won't hit this.

tax.note: Tax shown separately. Not deducted from paper P&L, displayed as after-tax P&L.
